name: Artist Rights Workshop by Bavisha
keywords: Creating a legally literate, empowered artist ecosystem
description: Knowing is Doing: Artist Rightsis the first in the series of workshopping sessions led byBavisha. The Indian Artists Rights Campaign: Knowing is Doing - Artist Rights Workshop is an attempt to create a legally literate, empowered artist ecosystem that negotiates and asserts its rights.Date and timing:6 March 2026, 5 pm - 7 pm | 7 March 2026, 3 pm - 6 pmVenue:Goethe-Institut / Max Mueller Bhavan BangaloreFormat:Intimate, in-person workshop (limited to 20 participants)Language:EnglishFacilitator:BavishaEntry freeon a first come first served basis.Registration is mandatory.What will be discussed during the workshop:Day 1Historical timeline and legal developments in Indian IP lawUnderstanding creative contracts, agreements & basic legal hygiene as a creative practitionerDay 2Understanding the legal journey of an/any artworkCase studies, useful resources and contract templetsCollectively engaging in critical, speculative role-playing exercises within the context of Indian contemporary art
